articles.title: Iran warns U.S. troops will be "set on fire" if Americans launch ground operation - CBS News
articles.description: "As long as the Americans seek Iran's surrender, our response is clear: Far be it from us to accept humiliation," Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, Iran's parliament speaker, said Sunday.
articles.content: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, Iran's parliament speaker, on Sunday warned the United States against a ground invasion, threatening to set American troops "on fire" and step up attacks on U.S. allies, acc… [+3171 chars]
